overrides.expect: \left\{ \begin{array}{c} (a _ {1} \vee a _ {2} \vee \dots \vee a _ {k}) \\ \text {is satisfied} \end{array} \right\} \Longleftrightarrow \left\{ \begin{array}{c} \text {there is a setting of the y_{i} 's for which} \\ (a _ {1} \vee a _ {2} \vee y _ {1}) (\overline {{y}} _ {1} \vee a _ {3} \vee y _ {2}) \dots (\overline {{y}} _ {k - 3} \vee a _ {k - 1} \vee a _ {k}) \\ \text {are all satisfied} \end{array} \right\}.
overrides.new: \left\{ \begin{array}{c} (a _ {1} \vee a _ {2} \vee \dots \vee a _ {k}) \\ \text {is satisfied} \end{array} \right\} \Longleftrightarrow \left\{ \begin{array}{c} \text {there is a setting of the } y_{i} \text {'s for which} \\ (a _ {1} \vee a _ {2} \vee y _ {1}) (\overline {{y}} _ {1} \vee a _ {3} \vee y _ {2}) \dots (\overline {{y}} _ {k - 3} \vee a _ {k - 1} \vee a _ {k}) \\ \text {are all satisfied} \end{array} \right\}.
